identity.name: Hira Institute
identity.mission: Modernizing Quranic education with a blend of spiritual tradition and Swiss-style precision.

usage.headings: Manrope (English) / IBM Plex Sans Arabic (Arabic) - Bold, Tight Tracking
usage.body: Manrope (English) / IBM Plex Sans Arabic (Arabic) - Regular, Relaxed Leading

cards.style: Flat white surface, 1px border-border, subtle shadow-sm

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.patterns: Islamic geometric patterns used as low-opacity (5%) background watermarks.

images.description: Geometric Islamic Pattern - Use as subtle background texture or section divider
Detailed Mosaic Pattern - Use for login page sidebar or hero section overlay

media.icons: Lucide React (Default) or Phosphor Icons (for more weight)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 for text. Use darker teal (#0d7a71) for text on white if needed.
accessibility.rtl_support: CRITICAL: All layouts must support dir='rtl'. Use logical properties (ms-*, me-*, start-*, end-*) instead of left/right.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Implement the 'Organic & Earthy' archetype. Use the provided #fdfbf7 as the main background to avoid clinical white.
3. RTL: Ensure the <html> tag gets dir='rtl' when Arabic is selected. Test all flex/grid layouts for reversibility.
4. DASHBOARD: Build a 'Bento' grid layout for the main dashboard. Don't use equal-sized cards. Make the 'Current Hifz Progress' card dominant.
5. RECITATION UI: Create a custom component for 'Tasmee'. It should look like a media player but for tracking errors (Tajweed buttons).
6. HALAQA: Use a 'Kanban' or 'List' view for managing students in a circle. Avoid complex tables on mobile.
7. REPORTS: Use Recharts for progress. Style them with the brand teal/green gradients.
8. AUTH: Login page should be split 50/50. Left side form, Right side Islamic pattern image.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients, no 'Inter' font for headings.
Micro-interactions: Every button press, card hover, and tab switch must have a spring animation.
Data-TestID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
No Lorem Ipsum: Use real Islamic content (e.g., 'Surah Al-Fatiha', 'Juz 1', 'Student: Ahmed Ali').
